faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does it cost to launch a campaign?
faq.a1: Minimum budget 3,000 FCFA. You pay 50 FCFA per verified click, only when a real visitor clicks your link.
faq.q2: How do I get paid as an Echo?
faq.a2: Directly to your Wave account. Request a withdrawal from the app, minimum 500 FCFA.
faq.q3: How do I know the clicks are real?
faq.a3: Every click is validated server-side: IP verification, bot detection, device fingerprinting. You only pay for clean clicks.
faq.a4: Yes. Free signup, no subscription, no fees. You earn 50 FCFA for every click your Status generates.
faq.q5: Can I target a specific city?
faq.a5: Tamtam covers 40+ cities. You can target by geographic area when creating your campaign.
faq.q6: How much can you earn per month as an Echo?
faq.a6: It depends on your number of WhatsApp contacts and consistency. Some Echos earn 5,000–15,000 FCFA/month.

onboarding.howItWorks: You're about to reach hundreds of people in Dakar through their trusted WhatsApp contacts. Here's a quick tour to get you started.
onboarding.step2: Echos share it on their social networks
onboarding.step3: Their contacts click — you get real visitors
onboarding.step4: You only pay for verified clicks
onboarding.addFundsDesc: Start with as little as 10,000 FCFA (~$16).
onboarding.tourDashboardDesc: Here you'll find your real-time stats: clicks, budget spent, active campaigns, and your top Echos. Everything at a glance.
onboarding.tourCampaignsDesc: Create and manage your campaigns here. Add your destination link, set your budget and cost per click, and publish. Echos will start sharing immediately.
onboarding.tourWalletDesc: Top up your balance here to launch campaigns. Your budget is only spent on each verified click. You can top up anytime.
onboarding.tourAnalyticsDesc: Track each campaign's performance in detail: clicks per day, validation rate, geographic distribution, and ROI. See what works best.
onboarding.tourEchosDesc: See the Echos sharing your campaigns. You'll see how many clicks each one generates and their overall performance.
onboarding.tourSupportDesc: Need help? Contact our team directly from this page. We respond within 24 hours.
onboarding.tourReadyDesc: Start by topping up your wallet, then create your first campaign. The Echos of Dakar are ready to share your message!

support.title: Support
support.messageSent: Your message has been sent. We'll respond as soon as possible.
support.subject: Subject *
support.faq1q: How does cost per click work?
support.faq1a: You set a price per click (CPC). Your budget is deducted for each verified click. You only pay for real visitors.
support.faq2a: Our system verifies every click. Duplicates, bots, and suspicious clicks are automatically filtered to protect your budget.
support.faq3q: How do I recharge my wallet?
support.faq3a: Go to Wallet → Recharge. Pay via Wave. Your balance is credited after validation.
support.faq4q: How long does a campaign last?
support.faq4a: Until your budget is consumed. Most campaigns are completed in 2-5 days.
support.faq5a: Yes! Go to Rythmes → select your campaign → Pause. You can reactivate it at any time.
support.whatsappSupportDesc: Need quick help? Contact us on WhatsApp.
support.faq6q: How do I pause or reactivate a rythme?
support.faq6a: Open your active rythme and click "Pause". Unspent budget is refunded to your wallet. To resume, click "Reactivate" — the remaining budget will be debited again.

brandPage.heroSub: Traffic, awareness or leads — {echos} Echos share your campaign. You only pay for results.
brandPage.promoBanner: 2,000 FCFA free upon registration — limited offer
brandPage.step2Desc: Choose your objective (traffic, awareness or leads), set your budget — that's it
brandPage.step3Desc: {echos} people share on their social networks
brandPage.caseQuote: We spent 5,000 FCFA to promote an article. Result: 365 views, 160 verified visitors, 21.74% CTR.
brandPage.faq1q: How does cost per click work?
brandPage.faq1a: You set a CPC for your campaign. You only pay when a visitor actually clicks your link. Clicks are verified by our anti-fraud system.
brandPage.faq2q: How long does a campaign last?
brandPage.faq2a: A campaign runs as long as your budget is active. You can pause or stop it at any time.
brandPage.faq3a: Yes, you can pause and resume your campaigns at any time. Your remaining budget is preserved.
brandPage.faq4q: How do I top up my wallet?
brandPage.faq4a: You can top up via Wave or Orange Money directly from your dashboard.
brandPage.faq5a: Yes. Our system verifies each click with anti-fraud mechanisms: unique IP, minimum delay, browser fingerprint.
brandPage.objectivesSubtitle: Choose the objective that matches your goal
brandPage.objTrafficDesc: Send verified visitors to your website. Only pay for real clicks.
brandPage.objAwarenessDesc: Broadcast your visuals across hundreds of social statuses in Senegal.
brandPage.objLeadGenDesc: Collect qualified prospects via an AI-powered landing page with built-in form.
brandPage.aiSubtitle: Create a lead campaign in 5 minutes — AI handles the rest
brandPage.aiFeature1Desc: AI generates a unique landing page with your colors, brand and offer
brandPage.aiFeature2Desc: Collect name, phone, email and custom fields — fully configurable
brandPage.aiFeature3Desc: Receive each lead by email or WhatsApp instantly
brandPage.aiFeature4Desc: Automatic fraud score on every lead — zero fake prospects
brandPage.faq6a: You describe your offer, AI creates a landing page with a form. Echos share the link and you receive leads directly. You only pay for verified leads.

echoPage.heroSub1: Share links. Your contacts click. You earn.
echoPage.heroSub2: Withdraw via Wave or Orange Money.
echoPage.step1Desc: Create your account with your number
echoPage.step2Desc: Choose from available campaigns. You get a personalized link.
echoPage.step3Desc: Your contacts click → you earn 15–188 FCFA per verified click
echoPage.gamifTitle: The more you share, the more you earn
echoPage.trust1: Payment via Wave and Orange Money
echoPage.proof1Quote: I earned 6,438 FCFA by sharing 3 links
echoPage.proof2Quote: I withdrew my first payment in 2 days
